---
name: Reproducible RTL or flow defect
about: Report a public-scope issue with a bounded reproduction
title: "[bug] "
---

## Release And Profile

- Public tag or commit:
- Profile or top module:
- Host OS and tool version:

## Reproduction

```text
Exact command and public-scope setup
```

## Expected And Actual Behavior

Describe the expected behavior, observed result, and any exact PASS marker or
native error summary.

## Sanitized Evidence

Attach only public-safe logs or a minimal reproducer. Do not attach PDK files,
license data, credentials, generated FPGA IP, board projects, or proprietary
tool databases.
